title: Dollar Edges Higher as Traders Mull Trump’s Next Trade Steps
description: The dollar erased earlier declines Monday as traders considered the impact of President Donald Trump’s latest plan for global tariffs on US imports.
content: The dollar erased earlier declines Monday as traders considered the impact of President Donald Trump’s latest plan for global tariffs on US imports.
